---
title: "About Me"
---

I am currently pursuing my studies in Data Analytics. I love working with big datasets, automating processes, and building predictive models.

## Background
- **Education**: B.S. in Data Analytics
- **Location**: Global

## Skills
- **Programming**: Python (Pandas, Scikit-learn, FastAPI), R, SQL
- **Visualization**: Tableau, PowerBI, Quarto, Matplotlib
- **Web Development**: React, Next.js, HTML/CSS

## Goals
I aim to leverage data to drive meaningful business decisions and build robust, full-stack analytical applications.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Fun Fact
I once optimized a SQL query that reduced report generation time from 4 hours to 2 minutes!
:::
